symptom: phase10_real_doc_level_rows.json only had 14 doc_ids instead of 86
root_cause: Export was not re-run after Phase 10.7 expanded labels to 86 cases
repair_action: Re-ran real pipeline export to regenerate rows JSON with all 86 doc_ids
validation_after_fix: Verified all 86 doc_ids present in regenerated JSON
prevention_rule: Re-export must be re-run after label expansion

root_cause: Windows python3.exe resolves instead of WSL Python, defaulting to system encoding (GBK on Chinese Windows)
repair_action: Used uv run python instead of bare python3; specified encoding='utf-8'
validation_after_fix: uv run python scripts/... works without encoding error
prevention_rule: Always use 'uv run python' in this repo; never rely on bare 'python3'

symptom: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'strip' in label_full_doc_level.py
root_cause: csv.DictReader returns None for empty CSV cells; r.get('field', '').strip() fails when cell is None
repair_action: Changed to (r.get('field') or '').strip() for defensive CSV cell access
validation_after_fix: Script runs without AttributeError on empty CSV cells
prevention_rule: Use defensive CSV cell access: (r.get('field') or '').strip()

symptom: openspec archive failed due to incomplete tasks in tasks.md
root_cause: Tasks 1.6, 1.7, 1.8, 9.1-9.5, 9.7 were not marked as done before archive attempt
repair_action: Marked tasks as done, then re-ran with -y flag to skip interactive prompt
prevention_rule: Verify all tasks are complete before archive attempt
